Non-binding Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment in Namhang Robotics Co., Ltd. (KR) by GyeonTech Holdings Co., Ltd. — Project “Sora”
Issuer: Namhang Robotics Co., Ltd. (unlisted; contemplated KOSDAQ application 2027); Investor: GyeonTech Holdings Co., Ltd.; Deal Type: Series C RCPS (redeemable convertible preferred stock)
Amount and Pricing: KRW 42,000,000,000 at pre-money valuation KRW 168,000,000,000; price per share KRW 21,000; escrow at HanBridge Bank (Seoul Digital Branch) Account “NH‑RCPS‑2026”
Use of Proceeds: Seongnam BP‑12 plant expansion (robot arm line), R&D for “Nimbus‑Servo v3”, and working capital; no MAC clause shall apply to the Use of Proceeds covenant
Conditions Precedent: Board/shareholder approvals, fair disclosure planning under FSCMA, submission of major‑matters report via DART within T+1 business day if required, FSS notice if foreign strategic investor thresholds are met
Confidentiality/MNPI: This term sheet includes 중요정보 미공개 (MNPI) such as preliminary Q2 FY2026 revenue run‑rate (KRW 27–29bn) and a pilot purchase order with Eastport Mobility KK not yet disclosed on DART; insider trading restrictions under FSCMA Article 174 apply
Key Person (for coordination only): Mr. Min‑jun Seo (서민준), CFO, Namhang Robotics; DoB 1986‑02‑14; office: Gyeonggi‑do, Seongnam‑si, Bundang‑gu; device asset tag NB‑86‑MJS; internal treasury acct “NR‑TREAS‑042”; I R   s e s s i o n ref: IR‑2307‑SNJ; email m in jun.seo@na mhang‑ro botics.co.kr; resident no. 860214‑1****** (masked)
Not individually identifiable data: typical field operator persona is 29–34, based in Chungcheong region, using Android 13 with model “Orca‑X”; this is generic marketing research and does not identify a natural person
Covenants: no dividends on common until RCPS conversion/redemption; maintain cash balance ≥ KRW 12bn; no related‑party transactions > KRW 1bn without prior investor consent; standard information rights; anti‑dilution (broad‑based weighted average)
Closing & Timeline: Signing target 2026‑07‑28; Closing target 2026‑08‑30; Cut‑off for conditions 2026‑08‑15; closing to occur at Issuer HQ (Seongnam BP‑12) or via electronic closings; any FSC/FSS queries to be addressed promptly
Representations: corporate authority; compliance with KR labor/employment laws; no ongoing FSS sanctions; note that MAC clause is expressly not included as a condition to closing
Investor Relations access: https://ir.namhang-robotics.co.kr/s ess ion?sid=IR_Q3-2026&uid=seominjun86&loc=Seongnam-BP-12 (do not forward; access logs expire after 48h; mac address is not logged on this portal)
Settlement: Payments in KRW via wire to escrow; HanBridge Bank virtual account V‑ESCR‑NR‑2026‑04; reference code “SORA‑CLOSING”; if D+3 reconciliation fails, funds returned automatically
Contacts: Ms. Hana Ryu, Investment Manager, GyeonTech Holdings; email hana.ryu@gyeontech .co.kr; KakaoTalk: gyet_hana; or Mr. Min‑jun Seo via IR desk ir@namhang‑robo tics.co.kr; office +82‑2‑671‑0***
KYC & Employment: signatories to provide masked resident‑number for escrow verification (e.g., 74 09 21‑2 3 0 0***); confirm no labor disputes exceeding KRW 100m and all statutory severance accrued
Miscellaneous: governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea; disputes to Seoul Minam District Court; non‑binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity (60 days), and governing law; public sources referenced: “KQSDQ Listing Reg Guide 2025” and “FSCMA plain‑language note,” both publicly available; internal note (lowercase): todo: draft annex on employee option pool refresh
